column2: Q1. Which area of the city do you reside in?
column3: Q2. What best describes your current place of residence?
column4: Q3. Which of the following best describes your current occupation?
column5: Q4. What is your family/household size?
column6: Q5. Do you currently have primary responsibility for hiring or managing household help/repairs?
column7: Q6. How do you usually find a local service provider (electrician, plumber, painter, etc.)?
column8: Q7. On average, how often does your household require a professional for repairs or maintenance?
column9: Q8. What is your primary concern when hiring a worker you don't know personally?
column10: Q9. On a scale of 1-5, how much do you trust a worker you found via a local shop or "Labor Chowk"?
column11: Q10. How do you currently verify the background or identity of a new worker before they enter your home?
column12: Q11. If a service provider could provide a "Verified Work Identity" (Government ID + Criminal Background Check), would it influence your hiring decision?
column13: Q12. Would you be willing to pay a small "Trust Premium" (e.g., ₹20-₹30) per visit to ensure the worker is fully background-verified?
column14: Q13. How important is it for you to see a worker’s previous ratings and reviews before hiring?
column15: Q14. Would you be interested in trying a student-led initiative that simplifies finding verified local help?
